finding_results.notes: Removed all bookmaker-document artifacts (no docket/slip/race/stake object retained). Replaced proof with direct witnessed betting-window action and sensory residue so suspicion remains causal without early object introduction.
Replaced abstract closing with immediate material consequence: Tom takes housekeeping coins after Elsie chooses concealment, and she physically dilutes supper to absorb the loss.

Rebuilt confrontation hinge to include leverage shift from betting evidence: Elsie names what she saw, forces a specific amount admission, and secures a concrete repayment commitment before social-performance de-escalation.

summary: All packet findings were addressed with structural revisions focused on causality, leverage, and embodied consequence while preserving chapter continuity, voice register, and heading contract.
